# Wave H4 тАФ Visibility + Stat Depth

## Goal
Make the site easier to read and surface data we already collect. From `2026-04-23-improvements-plan.md`, picking highest-value Wave I + J + K items into one 6-lane fleet.

## Lane table

| Lane | Fleet | Size | Scope | Owns | Blocked by |
|------|-------|------|-------|------|------------|
| 1 | Han ЁЯШЙЁЯЪА | M | Anomaly banner on game/player when player_goals_sum > team_score | `views/game.ts`, `views/gameDetail.ts`, `views/playerDetail.ts`, NEW `components/anomalyBanner.ts` | тАФ |
| 2 | Yoda ЁЯС╜тЬи | M | Header search-as-you-type | NEW `server/src/routes/search.ts`, NEW `web/src/components/searchBox.ts`, `api.ts`, `main.ts` (insert search bar in header only) | тАФ |
| 3 | Leia ЁЯССЁЯТБтАНтЩАя╕П | S | `/status` page + "last updated" footer line on dashboard | NEW `views/status.ts`, `views/dashboard.ts` (footer line only), `router.ts` add route | тАФ |
| 4 | Chewy ЁЯР╗ЁЯТк | S | Mobile responsive grid + schedule newest-first | `styles.css`, `views/schedule.ts` sort | тАФ |
| 5 | R2 ЁЯдЦЁЯФз | S | Goalie saves + faceoff leaderboards | `server/src/routes/leaders.ts` add stats, `web/src/views/leaders.ts` add tabs | тАФ |
| 6 | Luke ЁЯМЯтЪФя╕П | S | Dead-route audit (`rivalries.ts`, `seasons.ts`) + nightly DB snapshot script | NEW `scripts/snapshotDb.ts`, possible deletes in `server/src/routes/`, `main.ts` (only nav links) | тАФ |

## File boundary contract
- **`main.ts`**: only Yoda (header search) and Leia (router add) and Luke (nav links) touch it. Yoda inserts in `<header>` block. Leia adds `registerView('status', ...)` after existing registers. Luke adds nav `<a>` tags after existing nav links. Distinct line ranges.
- **`styles.css`**: Chewy owns exclusively. Other lanes: only use existing class names.
- **No lane** modifies `data/lacrosse.db`, `Dockerfile`, `infra/`, `.github/workflows/`.

## Validation
- `pnpm -r typecheck` clean
- `pnpm -r test` green
- `pnpm dev` boots; visit each new route and screenshot

## Carry-forward to Wave H5
- Parser bug: investigate "Mason Proctor and Javier Gonzalez-Cruz" composite player row (R2 finding)
- Per-quarter chart on game detail (uses existing `game_periods` table)
- `confidence` badges on player_stats rows (column populated, never surfaced)

## Wave H4 Retrospective

### Actual vs Estimated
- Lane 1 Han (M): ~4m тЖТ тЬЕ on target
- Lane 2 Yoda (M): ~3m тЖТ тЬЕ ahead
- Lane 3 Leia (S): ~4.5m тЖТ тЪая╕П slightly over (S=expected ~3m); reasonable, freshness route inspection took time
- Lane 4 Chewy (S): ~1.5m тЖТ тЬЕ way ahead
- Lane 5 R2 (S): ~2m тЖТ тЬЕ ahead, was a no-op
- Lane 6 Luke (S): ~2.5m тЖТ тЬЕ on target

### Critical path
- All 6 lanes parallel, no blockers; longest lane (Han) drove wall clock (~4m)

### What went well
- Hard file boundaries on `main.ts` + `styles.css` prevented merge conflicts entirely
- All commits landed cleanly via simple `git pull --rebase` then push to legacy
- Sub-agents auto-discovered prior-shipped work (R2) instead of duplicating

### What to improve for Wave H5
- Plan was slightly stale for R2 (used `stat=` instead of actual `metric=`); orchestrator should grep route param names before drafting prompts
- Han's heuristic threshold (12 goals/game) for player-row anomaly is brittle тАФ H5 lane should make it data-driven (3╧Г above season mean per position?)
